hyperedges.label: Shared Physics for Human and AI
Shared Shot Computation Pipeline (human + AI both call compute_shot_velocity)
Debug Visualization Pipeline (trajectory → posture commit → intercept pool → AI indicators)
Swing Animation Pipeline (charge → follow-through → posture reset)
Ball Physics Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files collectively implementing the realistic pickleball flight model: drag, Magnus, spin, bounce COR, and calibration. Shared static API (predict_aero_step, cor_for_impact_speed, get_effective_gravity) ensures predictors stay in lockstep.

hyperedges.label: Posture Data Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Three files that together define, store, and resolve posture offsets/rotations. PostureLibrary is the data source; PostureDefinition is the schema; PostureOffsetResolver is the consumer converting IDs to world-space paddle vectors.

hyperedges.label: Posture Commit Pipeline
hyperedges.description: The trajectory-to-committed-ghost selection pipeline. PlayerAwarenessGrid feeds zone scores and approach info into PostureCommitSelector which picks the green-pool winner. PoseController then blends the base locomotion pose onto the stroke posture via PostureLibrary.

hyperedges.label: Serve Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files forming the complete serve flow: GameServe owns charge state and ball velocity computation; GameTrajectory visualises the arc; RallyScorer validates server position. Ball receives the final velocity via serve().

hyperedges.label: Rally Rules Subsystem
hyperedges.description: RallyScorer is the single authority for all fault detection (OOB, double-bounce, kitchen volley, two-bounce rule, body hit, net touch, momentum). It connects to Ball signals and emits rally_ended to game.gd.

hyperedges.label: Shot System Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files that together implement the shot velocity, spin, and trajectory computation pipeline.

hyperedges.label: Debug & Calibration Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files focused on developer debugging, physics calibration, and automated probing.

hyperedges.label: Player Animation Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Files that together build and animate the procedural player body.

hyperedges.label: Audio Tuning Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files for real-time audio signature editing of paddle and court sounds.

hyperedges.label: Input Delegation Flow
hyperedges.description: InputHandler receives all keyboard/action input and delegates to game.gd, practice_launcher, camera_rig, posture_editor, reaction_button.

hyperedges.label: Practice & Training Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Practice ball launcher with 12 realistic shot types and TTC-driven reaction button.

hyperedges.label: Court & Rules Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Court geometry and rules engine sharing PickleballConstants.

hyperedges.label: IK System
hyperedges.description: Two-bone IK data flow: PostureDefinition fields → PostureSkeletonApplier (stores metadata) → PlayerArmIK (reads posture def + metadata, computes targets/poles) → RightArm/LeftArm (law-of-cosines solve_ik). Leg IK via Leg.solve_ik driven by PostureSkeletonApplier foot targets.

hyperedges.label: FX System
hyperedges.description: Effect pipeline: HitFeedback listens to ball signals → triggers CameraRig.add_shake, TimeScale hitstop, and FXPool.spawn_burst/spawn_decal. FXPool owns pooled ImpactBurst (CPUParticles3D) and BounceDecal nodes. BallTrail renders per-physics-tick ribbon independently.

hyperedges.label: Camera System
hyperedges.description: CameraRig owns Camera3D and CameraShake child. Modes: default overhead follow (edge-threshold pan), 3rd-person orbit (Blue/Red/editor), auto-orbit. CameraShake applies trauma-based noise offsets. game.gd calls setup()+update(); HitFeedback and GizmoController also interact with CameraRig.

hyperedges.label: Gizmo System
hyperedges.description: PostureEditorGizmos creates and manages GizmoController. GizmoController owns GizmoHandle children (PositionGizmo, RotationGizmo). Hover detection uses invisible sphere colliders; drag uses camera-facing plane intersection. Signals propagate: GizmoController → PostureEditorGizmos → posture editor UI.

hyperedges.label: PickleballConstants Consumers
hyperedges.description: Files that directly import or alias from PickleballConstants (constants.gd): PhysicsUtils (all physics+court), PostureConstants (overhead triggers), GameShots (court geometry via _refresh_court_constants). Net.gd duplicates NET_HEIGHT/COURT_WIDTH as local literals instead.

hyperedges.label: Posture Editor Tab System
hyperedges.description: All 7 editor tabs share the same design pattern: extend VBoxContainer, instantiate SliderField/Vector3Editor widgets, emit field_changed(field_name, value) signal, mutate the posture definition Resource directly in _on_field_changed, and expose set_definition(def) for state sync. Tabs are pure UI — no direct gizmo or state references.
hyperedges.pattern: Widget → lambda → _on_field_changed → mutates def + emits field_changed

hyperedges.label: Gizmo System
hyperedges.description: Three-level hierarchy: GizmoHandle (base, ray-sphere intersection, hover/select state, Label3D) → PositionGizmo (sphere + XYZ axis cylinders/cones, constrained drag axis) and RotationGizmo (3 torus rings, SDF ray marching, pitch/yaw/roll). Body-part gizmos override raycast_test to return -1 so body-mesh hover detection is not blocked.

hyperedges.label: Preview Subsystem
hyperedges.description: PostureEditorPreview orchestrates PoseTrigger (static freeze inspection) and TransitionPlayer (animated phase sequence). These two modes are mutually exclusive: play_transition releases any frozen pose first. State is read from PostureEditorState. Preview postures are contextualized via base_pose_library for 8 preview context modes.

hyperedges.label: Rally & Physics Test Group
hyperedges.description: Tests covering game simulation systems: rally_scorer (37 tests) and shot_physics (16 + 9 pure-math). Both use fake doubles and are scene-less. Run via test_runner.gd headless.

hyperedges.label: Posture Editor Test Group
hyperedges.description: Tests covering posture editor UI and posture zone logic: test_posture_editor_controls (7-tab coverage, scene-less control wiring) and test_posture_zones (zone boundaries, height tiers, green pool, grade rubric). Both are headless with inline fakes.

hyperedges.label: State ↔ Tab ↔ Gizmo Data Flow
hyperedges.description: Posture editor data flows: PostureEditorState holds current definition → tabs receive it via set_definition(def) → user edits via SliderField/Vector3Editor → tab emits field_changed → shell (posture_editor_ui) applies to def and calls refresh_from_definition → PoseTrigger live-previews. Gizmos (via gizmo_controller) independently read/write fields from the same def Resource.

hyperedges.label: Test Infrastructure
hyperedges.description: All test orchestration and execution components: CLI runner (test_runner), MCP-compatible runner (test_all_suites), editor runner (test_editor_runner), E2E runner (e2e_test_runner), and fast-mode helper (_e2e_fast_mode). All share the run_all(totals: Dictionary) protocol.

hyperedges.label: UI System
hyperedges.description: Full in-game UI stack: Hud (labels), PauseController (autoload lifecycle), PauseMenu (overlay), SettingsPanel (tabbed settings), Settings (autoload persistence). Data flows: PauseController -> PauseMenu -> SettingsPanel -> Settings autoload -> settings_changed signal -> consumers (CameraRig, AudioServer).

hyperedges.label: Fake/Mock Test Doubles
hyperedges.description: Test doubles matching the surface of real game objects: FakePlayer (Node, matches player.gd for RallyScorer), FakeBall (RefCounted, matches ball.gd for RallyScorer), FakeBallNode (Node, matches ball.gd for ShotPhysics). All field names mirror production scripts exactly.

hyperedges.label: TimeScale Consumer Group
hyperedges.description: All systems that call TimeScaleManager: PauseController (force_normal/release_forced_normal on menu open/close), E2ETestRunner (set_test_fast_forward for 10x E2E speed), E2EFastMode (same), and potentially PlayerHitting (request_slowmo for reaction hit button).

hyperedges.label: Posture Data Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Authoring pipeline: extract_postures_tool (EditorScript) reads PostureLibrary in-code defaults and writes them to res://data/postures/*.tres. At runtime PostureLibrary.load_or_default() reads from that directory. Tests (test_posture_persistence, test_base_pose_system) verify the library and blend logic directly.

nodes.label: PostureLibrary
nodes.description: Singleton RefCounted that loads and indexes 21 PostureDefinition Resources. Lazy-initialised. Falls back to _build_defaults() if disk data dir absent.

nodes.label: PostureDefinition
nodes.description: Resource holding per-posture constants: paddle_forehand_mul, paddle_forward_mul, paddle_y_offset, roll/pitch/yaw, zone AABB, charge/follow-through offsets and timings.

nodes.label: PlayerAwarenessGrid
nodes.description: 3D volumetric awareness grid attached as child of a CharacterBody3D player. Vertices light up along ball trajectory with TTC-based colors. Zone activation feeds posture-score bias into commit logic.

nodes.label: PlayerAwarenessGrid.set_trajectory_points()
nodes.description: Main data-intake function. Transforms world trajectory points to player-local space, activates vertices within ACTIVATION_RADIUS (0.4m), then recomputes zone and posture scores.

nodes.label: PlayerAwarenessGrid.get_posture_zone_scores()
nodes.description: Returns dict of posture→score for ghost commit bias. Consumed by PostureCommitSelector.find_best_green_posture().

nodes.label: PlayerAwarenessGrid.get_ttc_at_world_point()
nodes.description: GAP-33. Returns minimum TTC among activated vertices near the query world point. Authoritative TTC source for committed ghost, reaction button, and other consumers.

nodes.label: PlayerAwarenessGrid.get_approach_info()
nodes.description: Returns urgency-weighted approach metrics: height, lateral, urgency, confidence. Consumed by PostureCommitSelector to override local_lat/local_ht when confidence > 5.

nodes.label: PlayerAwarenessGrid.ZoneID
nodes.description: 13 zone IDs: FOREHAND_HIGH/MID/LOW/WIDE, BACKHAND_HIGH/MID/LOW/WIDE, CENTER_HIGH/MID/LOW, OVERHEAD, BEHIND.

nodes.label: Ball
nodes.description: RigidBody3D pickleball. Implements quadratic air drag, Magnus curl, spin damping, manual floor bounce with velocity-dependent COR (Cross 1999). Emits: hit_by_paddle, bounced, hit_player_body.

nodes.label: Ball._physics_process()
nodes.description: Per-frame physics: quadratic air drag (GAP-55), Magnus curl (GAP-59), spin damping (GAP-61), manual floor bounce with spin-tangential coupling (GAP-60), debounce re-arm.

nodes.label: Ball.cor_for_impact_speed() [static]
nodes.description: Velocity-dependent COR from Cross (1999): lerp 0.78→0.56 from 3→18 m/s. GAP-21. Used by manual bounce and predictors.

nodes.label: Ball.get_effective_gravity() [static]
nodes.description: Canonical gravity value for all predictors. ProjectSettings default_gravity × GRAVITY_SCALE.

nodes.label: Ball signal: hit_by_paddle(player_num)
nodes.description: Emitted on paddle contact. Connected to: audio_synth.on_paddle_hit, RallyScorer._on_any_paddle_hit, BallPhysicsProbe.

nodes.label: Ball signal: bounced(position)
nodes.description: Emitted from inside manual floor bounce code — guaranteed not to miss fast bounces. Connected to: audio_synth.on_floor_bounce, RallyScorer._on_ball_bounced, BallPhysicsProbe._on_ball_bounced.

nodes.label: Ball signal: hit_player_body(player_num)
nodes.description: Emitted when ball physically contacts a player capsule (not paddle). Triggers body-hit fault in RallyScorer.

nodes.label: Ball aero constants block
nodes.description: AIR_DENSITY=1.225, DRAG_COEFFICIENT=0.47, MAGNUS_COEFFICIENT=0.0003, SPIN_DAMPING_HALFLIFE=150.0, SPIN_BOUNCE_TRANSFER=0.25, SPIN_BOUNCE_DECAY=0.70, AERO_EFFECT_SCALE=0.79. Tunable via BallPhysicsProbe (key 4).

nodes.label: PoseController
nodes.description: Node child of player. Computes base_pose_state (locomotion: LANDING_RECOVERY, SPLIT_STEP, LATERAL_SHUFFLE, CROSSOVER_RUN, etc.) and pose_intent (DINK, GROUNDSTROKE, LOB_DEFENSE, etc.). Blends base pose onto stroke posture via compose_runtime_posture().

nodes.label: PoseController.update_runtime_pose_state()
nodes.description: Per-frame driver. Ticks jump/landing/lunge/split-step/decel timers, resolves contact context, selects new base_pose_state. Invalidates compose cache on state change.

nodes.label: PoseController.compose_runtime_posture()
nodes.description: Returns blended PostureDefinition: base_pose_def.blend_onto_stroke(stroke_def). Loads PostureLibrary for stroke def. Uses pose cache keyed on (posture_id, state_id).

nodes.label: PoseController base_pose_state state machine
nodes.description: States: LANDING_RECOVERY > JUMP_TAKEOFF/AIR_SMASH > OVERHEAD_PREP > FOREHAND_LUNGE/BACKHAND_LUNGE/LOW_SCOOP_LUNGE > SPLIT_STEP > DECEL_PLANT > CROSSOVER_RUN > LATERAL_SHUFFLE > BACKPEDAL > RECOVERY_READY > intent-based (DINK_BASE, GROUNDSTROKE_BASE, etc.) > KITCHEN_NEUTRAL/ATHLETIC_READY.

nodes.label: RallyScorer
nodes.description: Owns all fault detection and rally-ending decisions. Duck-typed refs so FakeBall/FakePlayer stubs work for tests. Emits rally_ended(winner, reason, detail).

nodes.label: RallyScorer signal: rally_ended(winner, reason, detail)
nodes.description: Emitted when any fault fires. game.gd connects to this and calls _on_point_scored.

nodes.label: RallyScorer.bind(ball, player_left, player_right)
nodes.description: Connects to ball signals (bounced, hit_by_paddle, hit_player_body). Called once by game.gd in _ready().

nodes.label: RallyScorer fault constants
nodes.description: FAULT_OUT_OF_BOUNDS, DOUBLE_BOUNCE, BALL_IN_NET, KITCHEN_VOLLEY, MOMENTUM, TWO_BOUNCE_RULE, BODY_HIT, SHORT_SERVE, WRONG_SERVICE_COURT, FOOT_FAULT, WRONG_HALF, NET_TOUCH.

nodes.label: RallyScorer check_* validators
nodes.description: check_out_of_bounds, check_service_ball_landed, check_server_position, check_kitchen_volley_at_hit, check_two_bounce_rule, check_double_bounce_and_net_ball, check_momentum_fault, check_net_touch. All pure-ish — callable directly in tests.

nodes.label: PostureCommitSelector
nodes.description: RefCounted. Extracted from player_paddle_posture.gd. Given trajectory + ghost positions → picks committed posture (green pool) and scores hit quality. Usable headlessly in tests.

nodes.label: PostureCommitSelector.find_best_green_posture()
nodes.description: Zone-based commit selection. Uses awareness_grid.get_approach_info() to override local_lat/local_ht when confidence > 5. Falls back to zone-center proximity when no greens exist.

nodes.label: PostureCommitSelector.build_green_set()
nodes.description: Iterates posture ghosts, calls is_ghost_near_trajectory (within 0.30m of any traj point). CHARGE postures always excluded.

nodes.label: PostureCommitSelector.compute_ttc()
nodes.description: TTC from trajectory arc index difference × 0.04s step time. Fallback: straight-line distance / ball speed. Clamped 0–3s.

nodes.label: PostureCommitSelector.grade_ball_to_ghost()
nodes.description: Returns PERFECT (<0.25m), GREAT (<0.40m), GOOD (<0.60m), OK (<0.80m), MISS otherwise.

nodes.label: PostureCommitSelector.compute_contact_at_player_z()
nodes.description: Projects ball to player's Z plane analytically, handling pre-bounce floor arc. Uses cor_func Callable argument.

nodes.label: PostureOffsetResolver
nodes.description: RefCounted. Phase 2 extracted offset/rotation computation. Provides get_posture_offset_for() and get_posture_rotation_offset_for(). Tries PostureLibrary first, falls back to hardcoded values.

nodes.label: PostureOffsetResolver.get_posture_offset_for()
nodes.description: Returns paddle world-space position offset. Checks transition_pose_blend override first, then PostureLibrary, then hardcoded fallback.

nodes.label: PostureOffsetResolver.get_posture_rotation_offset_for()
nodes.description: Returns paddle rotation offset (pitch/yaw/roll). Same three-tier lookup as get_posture_offset_for.

nodes.label: PostureOffsetResolver.compute_contact_at_player_z()
nodes.description: O(1) analytical ball projection to player's Z plane. Handles floor bounce. Calls Ball.get_effective_gravity() and Ball.cor_for_impact_speed().

nodes.label: PostureOffsetResolver.get_overhead_posture()
nodes.description: Returns HIGH_OVERHEAD or MEDIUM_OVERHEAD posture enum value based on ball height + horizontal distance, with hysteresis if already in overhead posture.

nodes.label: BallPhysicsProbe
nodes.description: Node. Iterative calibration tool (key 4). Captures trajectory samples, detects first bounce via ball.bounced signal, reports measured vs real-pickleball decel/COR/spin-decay. Suggests AERO_EFFECT_SCALE adjustment.

nodes.label: BallPhysicsProbe.begin_probe()
nodes.description: Initialises probe state, connects to ball.bounced, prints config snapshot comparing current constants to USAPA spec.

nodes.label: BallPhysicsProbe._finalize()
nodes.description: Post-bounce analysis: horizontal decel (measured vs ref vs game expected), bounce COR vertical (measured vs Cross 1999 curve), tangential delta (spin transfer), pre-bounce spin decay.

nodes.label: GameTrajectory
nodes.description: Node child of game.gd. Owns serve trajectory visualization (ImmediateMesh dashed arc), red AI target marker, ball landing prediction. Calls Ball.predict_aero_step() for physics-accurate arc.

nodes.label: GameTrajectory._draw_trajectory()
nodes.description: Renders dashed arc via ImmediateMesh LINE_STRIP. Calls Ball.predict_aero_step() per sub-step. TRAJECTORY_STEPS=14, TRAJECTORY_SUBSTEPS=3, dt=0.08/3.

nodes.label: GameTrajectory._predict_ball_landing_pos()
nodes.description: Forward-Euler integration using Ball.predict_aero_step() until floor hit. Returns landing world position or Vector3.INF.

nodes.label: GameTrajectory.update()
nodes.description: Main per-frame entry. Handles WAITING (serve charge arc) and PLAYING (rally) states. Caches by key string to skip unchanged frames.

nodes.label: GameServe
nodes.description: Node child of game.gd. Owns serve charge state, aim/arc offsets, serve execution (set ball position + velocity), server-position fault detection, serve UI updates. Emits serve_launched(team).

nodes.label: GameServe.setup()
nodes.description: Dependency injection: game.gd, ball, player_left, player_right, rally_scorer, scoreboard_ui, ShotPhysics script ref.

nodes.label: GameServe.perform_serve()
nodes.description: Validates server position via rally_scorer.check_server_position(). Sets ball position + linear_velocity. Calls player.animate_serve_release(). Emits serve_launched.

nodes.label: GameServe.get_predicted_serve_velocity()
nodes.description: Computes serve launch velocity from charge_ratio, aim offset, arc offset. Targets diagonal service court box. Speed: lerp(MIN_SERVE_SPEED, MAX_SERVE_SPEED, charge).

nodes.label: GameServe signal: serve_launched(team)
nodes.description: Emitted after ball velocity is set and audio plays. game.gd listens to transition game state.

nodes.label: PostureConstants (_PC)
nodes.description: Shared numeric constants for posture system: PADDLE_SIDE_OFFSET, PADDLE_FORWARD_OFFSET, overhead trigger heights, charge heights, etc. Preloaded by PostureOffsetResolver.

nodes.label: PickleballConstants
nodes.description: Global autoload. Court geometry, serve speed bounds, arc intent bounds, momentum fault window, non-volley zone, net height, floor Y.

nodes.label: BasePoseLibrary
nodes.description: Loaded by PoseController._ready(). Provides base pose definitions indexed by BasePoseState enum (locomotion states).

nodes.label: GameDebugUI
nodes.description: Owns debug cycling, posture debug labels, zone debug display. Extracted from game.gd. Manages debug_z_cycle (0=off,1=on,2=no-zones), intent indicators, service zone debug, and per-player posture/contact HUD.

nodes.label: GameDebugUI.cycle_difficulty()
nodes.description: Cycles AI difficulty EASY/MEDIUM/HARD and propagates to player_right's ai_brain.

nodes.label: GameDebugUI.update()
nodes.description: Called each frame from game.gd _physics_process. Updates service zone and debug label.

nodes.label: GameDebugUI.update_posture_debug()
nodes.description: Builds BLUE/RED posture text (posture name, stance, feet width) and sends to scoreboard_ui.

nodes.label: Court (court.gd)
nodes.description: Creates StaticBody3D court with playing surface, apron, lines, walls, debug zones. Constants: COURT_LENGTH=13.4, COURT_WIDTH=6.1, NET_HEIGHT=0.91. Uses PickleballConstants.NON_VOLLEY_ZONE.

nodes.label: Court.DebugZones
nodes.description: Colored service box overlays: MAGENTA=Red Right, PURPLE=Red Left, CYAN=Blue Right, LIME=Blue Left, RED=kitchen (NVZ). Hidden by default, Z key toggles via game_debug_ui.

nodes.label: Court.create_walls()
nodes.description: Creates 4 transparent StaticBody3D boundary walls (bounce=0.6, friction=0.5).

nodes.label: ShotPhysics
nodes.description: RefCounted. Core shot velocity and spin solver for pickleball. Iterative aero-trajectory simulation, net clearance, sweet spot modeling. Constants: MIN_SWING_SPEED=7.0, MAX_SWING_SPEED=22.35, NET_CLEAR_MIN=1.30.

nodes.label: ShotPhysics.compute_shot_velocity()
nodes.description: Signature: (ball_pos, charge_ratio, player_num, shot_type, ai_difficulty) -> Vector3. Iterative solver (6 passes) with net-clearance and landing-position corrections. Shot types: SMASH, FAST, VOLLEY, DINK, DROP, LOB, RETURN. AI difficulty scales speed and lateral targeting.

nodes.label: ShotPhysics.compute_shot_spin()
nodes.description: Computes angular velocity for shot. Topspin via UP×travel axis. SMASH=55, FAST=45, LOB=18, DROP=-20, DINK=-12. Sidespin from posture family (backhand vs forehand).

nodes.label: ShotPhysics.compute_sweet_spot_spin()
nodes.description: GAP-15: off-center hit adds torque based on lever arm from sweet spot.

nodes.label: ShotPhysics.compute_sweet_spot_speed()
nodes.description: GAP-15: off-center hit reduces speed 0-40% from sweet spot radius 0.04m to edge radius 0.12m.

nodes.label: ShotPhysics.simulate_shot_trajectory()
nodes.description: Forward simulation using ball.gd.predict_aero_step() at 120Hz, max 200 steps. Returns dict: crossed_target, pos_at_target, y_at_net, t_at_net, t_total, apex_y.

nodes.label: PracticeLauncher
nodes.description: Node. Training/practice ball launcher with zone-based trajectory bundles and USAPA-spec shot types. Zones: BASELINE (50%), MIDCOURT (20%), NEAR-KITCHEN (20%), IN-KITCHEN (10%). 12 shot types: RALLY, DRIVE, TOPSPIN_ROLL, DROP, DINK, LOB_DEFENSIVE, LOB_OFFENSIVE, POPUP, SPEEDUP, SLICE, KICK_SERVE.

nodes.label: PracticeLauncher.launch_ball()
nodes.description: Launches a practice ball: resets ball state, selects zone/shot_type, computes projectile velocity with net-clearance, selects spin mode (topspin/backspin/sidespin/combined).

nodes.label: PlayerBodyBuilder
nodes.description: Node. Procedural body mesh generator: chest, head, hips, paddle (from scenes/paddle.tscn), right/left legs (from scenes/right_leg.tscn, left_leg.tscn), right/left arms (scenes/right_arm.tscn, left_arm.tscn). Also creates full Skeleton3D with 19 bones for posture wiring.

nodes.label: PlayerBodyBuilder.build()
nodes.description: Creates all body meshes, instantiates paddle scene, wires paddle_hitbox, calls _create_skeleton(). Deferred _wire_hitbox() for ai_brain connection.

nodes.label: PlayerBodyBuilder._create_skeleton()
nodes.description: Creates Skeleton3D with bone hierarchy: Hips -> Spine -> Chest -> (Neck -> Head, shoulders, arms), Hips -> thighs -> shins -> feet. Stores indices in player.skeleton_bones dict.

nodes.label: PostureColors
nodes.description: RefCounted. Static color math library for posture ghost materials. Stages: PINK(far), PURPLE(TTC<TTC_PURPLE), BLUE(TTC<TTC_BLUE or contact imminent). Also: green-lit trajectory fade, hit-flash orange, proximity ramp, awareness-grid TTC-tiered override.

nodes.label: PostureColors.green_fading()
nodes.description: Fades ghost color from green toward base ghost color over 0.6s when ghost leaves trajectory proximity.

nodes.label: PostureColors.apply()
nodes.description: Applies a color dict (albedo, emission, em_mult) to a StandardMaterial3D.

nodes.label: SwingE2EProbe
nodes.description: Node. End-to-end probe for GAP-X: paddle velocity → ball speed coupling test. 5-stage pipeline: fire serve, wait for AI return, detect player hit, capture velocities, compare predicted vs measured speed. Runs 3 shots at charge ratios [0.3, 0.6, 0.9].

nodes.label: PostureDefinition
nodes.description: Resource. Full-body definition of a single paddle posture. Fields: identity (posture_id, display_name, family, height_tier), paddle position/rotation (forehand_mul, forward_mul, y_offset, pitch/yaw/roll with sign-source), commit zone, right/left arm IK, legs/stance, hips/torso, body pivot, head, charge wind-up, follow-through. Provides resolve_paddle_rotation_deg(), resolve_paddle_offset(), lerp_with().

nodes.label: PostureDefinition.lerp_with()
nodes.description: Blends all numeric fields between two PostureDefinition resources for smooth transition playback.

nodes.label: BasePoseLibrary
nodes.description: RefCounted singleton. Loads BasePoseDefinition resources from res://data/base_poses/ or builds 22 defaults. Poses: 0=Athletic Ready, 1=Split Step, 2=Recovery Ready, 3=Kitchen Neutral, 4=Dink Base, 5=Drop Reset Base, 6=Punch Volley Ready, 7=Dink Volley Ready, 8=Deep Volley Ready, 9=Groundstroke Base, 10=Lob Defense Base, 11=Forehand Lunge, 12=Backhand Lunge, 13=Low Scoop Lunge, 14=Overhead Prep, 15=Jump Takeoff, 16=Air Smash, 17=Landing Recovery, 18=Lateral Shuffle, 19=Crossover Run, 20=Backpedal, 21=Decel Plant.

nodes.label: SoundTuneUI
nodes.description: Node. Legacy sound tuning panel UI (superseded by GameSoundTune). 26 sound parameters for paddle audio signature. P key toggles panel, arrows navigate/adjust, O prints tunings. Keys 6-8/Y/U/I trigger test sounds via ball.audio_synth.

nodes.label: GameSoundTune
nodes.description: Node. Current sound tuning panel (33 parameters including ball chirp, resonance, court weight/snap/decay/hardness/surface). Injected with ball_audio_synth, scoreboard_ui, hud. Emits slider_changed signal. Calls ball_audio_synth.get_sound_tunings() / set_sound_tuning().

nodes.label: InputHandler
nodes.description: Node. Centralized input controller. Handles: debug toggles (T/X/Z/E/ESC/N), camera controls (O/P/C), practice controls (4/1/2), sound controls (M/6-8/Y/U/I), swing charge (SPACE hold/release), serve aiming (Q/E arc R/F). Delegates to game.gd, camera_rig, practice_launcher, posture_editor, reaction_button.

nodes.label: InputHandler.setup()
nodes.description: Injects: game, ball, player_left, player_right, camera_rig, practice, posture_editor, sound_panel, reaction_button.

nodes.label: InputHandler._handle_swing_charge()
nodes.description: On ui_accept press: calls game._on_player_swing_press(). On release: calls game._on_player_swing_release(ratio). Checks reaction_button.is_perfect() for bonus. Updates player_left.set_serve_charge_visual().

nodes.label: InputHandler._update_aim_and_arc()
nodes.description: Serve aiming: Q/E keys adjust serve_aim_offset_x. Arc intent: R/F keys during charge adjust trajectory_arc_offset.

nodes.label: GameDropTest
nodes.description: Node. Kinematic drop test module extracted from game.gd. Uses ball.BOUNCE_COR and real gravity (9.81 m/s²) with no air drag. Drops from 78in (1.9812m), measures rebound analytically from v_out². USAPA spec: 30-34in. Emits test_complete signal.

nodes.label: ReactionHitButton
nodes.description: Control. Easy-mode reaction HIT button with collapsing ring driven by TTC (time-to-contact) from player_paddle_posture. Ring closes from RING_RADIUS_MAX=160px to BUTTON_RADIUS=60px as TTC approaches 0. Perfect window: stage==2 OR TTC<0.15s OR ring within ±14px of button. Emits auto_fire_requested signal. Grade flash overlay (PERFECT/GREAT/GOOD/OK/MISS).

nodes.label: ReactionHitButton.update_from_stage()
nodes.description: Called by game.gd on posture module's incoming_stage_changed signal. Args: stage(-1=clear, 0=PINK, 1=PURPLE, 2=BLUE), posture_name, commit_dist, ball2ghost, ttc.

nodes.label: DropTest
nodes.description: Node. Alternative kinematic drop test (T key). Uses ball.BOUNCE_COR and arcade gravity (gravity_scale * project_gravity). Integrates manually using delta. Peak detection by sampling. USAPA spec: 30-34in from 78in drop. Compare with GameDropTest which uses real gravity.

nodes.label: PlayerBodyAnimation
nodes.description: Node. Player body animation: lean, crouch, idle sway, walk bob. Constants: BODY_CHARGE_ROTATION=35°, BODY_LEAN_MAX=14°, CROUCH_LOW=0.28, CROUCH_MID_LOW=0.16, IDLE_SWAY_SPEED=1.8, WALK_BOB_AMOUNT=0.04. Reads runtime_posture_def for body_pitch/roll/yaw offsets.

nodes.label: PlayerBodyAnimation.update_body_lean()
nodes.description: Acceleration + velocity based lean into movement. Also leans toward committed ghost contact point (reach lean boost). Damped with BODY_LEAN_HALFLIFE=0.1.

nodes.label: PlayerBodyAnimation.update_crouch()
nodes.description: Crouch from posture: LOW=0.28, MID_LOW=0.16. Manual crouch stacks (deepest wins). Walk bob from leg_ik.gait_arc_length CoM height model.

nodes.label: PlayerBodyAnimation.update_body_track_ball()
nodes.description: Body rotation toward ball. CHARGE_BACKHAND: 110° turn. FH/BH stance base rotation. When committed: reduces stance_base by 80% to keep body aligned to ghost.

nodes.label: Rules (rules.gd)
nodes.description: Node. Pickleball rules engine. FaultType enum: NONE, OUT_OF_BOUNDS, NET_BALL, NON_VOLLEY_ZONE_VOLLEY, WRONG_SERVICE_COURT, BALL_HIT_TWICE, FAULT_SERVE. Double-bounce rule, NVZ/kitchen rules. Scoring: first to 11 with 2-point lead. Uses PickleballConstants for court dimensions.

nodes.label: PickleballConstants (global)
nodes.description: Global autoload with constants: COURT_LENGTH, COURT_WIDTH, NET_HEIGHT, NON_VOLLEY_ZONE, MAX_SERVE_CHARGE_TIME, SERVE_AIM_STEP, SERVE_AIM_MAX, ARC_INTENT_STEP/MIN/MAX.

nodes.label: BasePoseDefinition
nodes.description: Godot Resource holding body-only authored pose data: stance, arms, legs, torso, head fields. Layers under stroke/contact postures. Provides blend_onto_stroke, to_preview_posture, duplicate_pose.

nodes.label: PostureDefinition
nodes.description: Stroke/contact posture resource. Preloaded by BasePoseDefinition and PostureSkeletonApplier.

nodes.label: GameShots
nodes.description: Node that owns shot classification, speedometer, and out-indicator UI. Consumed by game.gd for swing decisions and rally scoring. Reads PickleballConstants for court geometry.

nodes.label: ScoreboardUI
nodes.description: Centralizes HUD management: score, speedometer, shot-type labels, fault/out/zone indicators, AI difficulty display. Reads CanvasLayer HUD node injected via setup().

nodes.label: PostureSkeletonApplier
nodes.description: RefCounted helper that applies PostureDefinition full-body fields to a player Skeleton3D. Applies head, torso, arms (stores IK pole metadata), and leg targets. Provides static stance_offset() utility used by PlayerArmIK and PostureEditorGizmos.

nodes.label: PlayerArmIK
nodes.description: Node child of player. update_arm_ik() reads PostureDefinition fields, calls PostureSkeletonApplier.stance_offset for pole targets, then calls RightArm.solve_ik and LeftArm.solve_ik each frame. Also drives intercept/target debug indicators.

nodes.label: LeftArm
nodes.description: Node3D with three-pivot (UpperArmPivot → ForearmPivot → HandPivot) two-bone IK using law-of-cosines. Provides solve_ik(target, pole, transform). Mesh segments are CapsuleMesh.

nodes.label: RightArm
nodes.description: Identical architecture to LeftArm: three-pivot two-bone IK. solve_ik aligns hand_pivot to paddle transform. Right arm targets the paddle position; hand transform matches paddle basis.

nodes.label: Leg
nodes.description: Node3D with three-pivot (ThighPivot → ShinPivot → FootPivot) two-bone IK for legs. solve_ik accepts foot_tilt parameter; resets foot to world-up orientation. Used for both left_leg and right_leg.

nodes.label: PostureConstants
nodes.description: RefCounted class with all paddle posture geometry, ghost visual, and commit-stage timing constants. Overhead trigger aliases forward from PickleballConstants. Provides DEBUG_POSTURE_NAMES array.

nodes.label: Net
nodes.description: Node that procedurally creates the net StaticBody3D with BoxMesh and BoxShape3D. Defines local COURT_WIDTH and NET_HEIGHT constants (not imported from PickleballConstants). Provides create_net(parent) and get_net_height().

nodes.label: PhysicsUtils
nodes.description: RefCounted pure-math utility class. Re-exports PickleballConstants values as local consts. Provides static _damp() and _damp_v3() functions for exponential half-life smoothing.

nodes.label: CameraShake
nodes.description: Trauma-based shake system. Uses FastNoiseLite to offset Camera3D h_offset/v_offset and rotation.z. Reads Settings autoload for video.shake intensity multiplier. Owned as child of CameraRig.

nodes.label: BallTrail
nodes.description: MeshInstance3D child of Game root. Ribbon trail using ImmediateMesh TRIANGLE_STRIP with ring-buffer of 8 ball positions. Camera-facing ribbon that tapers and fades yellow→orange. Reads Settings video.particle_density.

nodes.label: ImpactBurst
nodes.description: Pooled one-shot CPUParticles3D burst node. play(pos, color, strength, upward) fires the burst. Auto-hides after lifetime. Owned and reused by FXPool.

nodes.label: FXPool
nodes.description: Autoload Node3D. Pre-allocates 8 ImpactBursts and 4 BounceDecals as children. spawn_burst() and spawn_decal() find a free pooled item or reuse oldest. Reads Settings video.particle_density for gating and strength scaling.

nodes.label: HitFeedback
nodes.description: Node owned by game.gd. Connects to ball.hit_by_paddle and ball.bounced signals. On hit: drives CameraRig.add_shake, requests hitstop via TimeScale autoload, spawns FXPool burst. On bounce: spawns burst + decal via FXPool.

nodes.label: BounceDecal
nodes.description: Pooled flat glow disc at ball bounce positions. Thin CylinderMesh with unshaded additive material. Tweens scale expand + alpha fade over 0.7s. Owned and reused by FXPool.

nodes.label: PostureEditorTransport
nodes.description: Control that builds the transport bar UI (Play, Save buttons; phase label, time label, progress bar). Connects to TransitionPlayer signals for playback_started/stopped/finished/phase_changed. Exposes build_transport_bar(), set_play_callback(), set_save_callback().

nodes.label: GizmoHandle
nodes.description: Base class for 3D gizmo interaction nodes. Has posture_id, field_name, tab_name, body_part_name, gizmo_color, gizmo_type. Provides raycast_test(), set_selected(), set_hovered().

nodes.label: PositionGizmo
nodes.description: GizmoHandle subclass for translating body parts and paddle position. Created by PostureEditorGizmos for paddle, hands, elbows, feet, knees.

nodes.label: RotationGizmo
nodes.description: GizmoHandle subclass for rotating bones. Has ring_radius. calculate_rotation_from_drag() emits euler_delta. Created by PostureEditorGizmos for hips, chest, head.

nodes.label: TransitionPlayer
nodes.description: Drives posture-to-posture animation in the editor. Signals: playback_started, playback_stopped, playback_finished, phase_changed. Phases: CHARGE, CONTACT, FOLLOW_THROUGH, SETTLE, READY.

nodes.label: PoseTrigger
nodes.description: Handles snapping player to a posture for inspection. Freezes Engine.time_scale=0, blends bones/paddle/body_pivot with 300ms ease-out animation, then releases. Emits pose_triggered and pose_released signals.

nodes.label: PostureEditorPreview
nodes.description: Manages PoseTrigger and TransitionPlayer. Builds contextualized preview postures from state, constructs charge/follow-through preview defs, orchestrates play_transition flow. Injected refs: player, library, base_pose_library, state.

nodes.label: Vector3Editor
nodes.description: Reusable VBoxContainer widget with label + X/Y/Z SpinBox row. Emits value_changed(Vector3) on any component change. Used by tabs for Vector3 fields (elbow poles, knee poles, hand offsets, shoulder rotations).

nodes.label: SliderField
nodes.description: Reusable VBoxContainer with label, HSlider, and SpinBox. Slider and SpinBox stay synchronized. Emits value_changed(float). Used pervasively by all tabs for float fields.

nodes.label: PaddleTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for paddle position (forehand_mul, forward_mul, y_offset), base/signed rotation (pitch/yaw/roll), sign source dropdowns, floor clearance, and commit zone bounds. Uses SliderField throughout. Emits field_changed(field_name, value).

nodes.label: LegsTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for stance (width, front/back foot), foot yaw, knee pole targets (Vector3Editor), foot offsets (Vector3Editor), lead foot dropdown, crouch and weight shift sliders. Emits field_changed.

nodes.label: ArmsTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for shoulder rotations (Vector3Editor), hand offsets (Vector3Editor), elbow pole targets (Vector3Editor), and left hand mode dropdown (1-hand/2-hand/across chest/overhead lift). Emits field_changed.

nodes.label: TorsoTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for hip yaw, torso yaw/pitch/roll, spine curve, and body pivot yaw/pitch/roll. All SliderField. Emits field_changed.

nodes.label: HeadTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for head yaw/pitch (SliderField) and ball tracking weight. Emits field_changed.

nodes.label: ChargeTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for charge phase: paddle offset/rotation (Vector3Editor), body rotation deg, hip coil deg, back foot load. Emits field_changed.

nodes.label: FollowThroughTab
nodes.description: Editor tab for follow-through: paddle offset/rotation (Vector3Editor), hip uncoil deg, front foot load, phase durations (strike/sweep/settle/hold), ease curve dropdown (ExpoOut/QuadOut/SineInOut). Emits field_changed.

nodes.label: TestRallyScorer
nodes.description: 37-test suite for rally_scorer.gd. Covers: OOB (6), double bounce (2), ball in net (2), kitchen volley (4), momentum fault (4), two-bounce rule (4), service fault (4), server position (4), body hit (2), net touch (4), fault precedence (2), regressions (3). Uses FakeBall + FakePlayer.

nodes.label: TestPostureZones
nodes.description: Headless tests for posture zone classification and scoring. Covers: zone boundary containment, height-tier thresholds (LOW/MID_LOW/NORMAL/OVERHEAD), green-pool scoring, PERFECT/GREAT/GOOD/OK/MISS grade rubric, posture family classification. Uses inline ZoneFakePlayer.

nodes.label: TestPostureEditorControls
nodes.description: Scene-less tests verifying every posture editor tab control emits correct field_changed signal with correct field_name and value. Tests all 7 tabs: paddle, legs, arms, head, torso, charge, follow_through. Also tests signal_connections_integrity.

nodes.label: TestShotPhysics
nodes.description: Unit tests for shot_physics.gd compute_shot_velocity and compute_shot_spin. 16 tests: speed bounds (3), monotonicity (2), speed curve pow0.7 shape (1), shot-type modifiers (4), spin (3), AI targeting (2). Uses FakeBallNode + FakePlayer.

nodes.label: TestShotPhysicsShallow
nodes.description: L1 shallow tests for shot physics pure math — speed curve formula, lerp bounds, spin axis perpendicularity. No scene, no Ball class, no ShotPhysics instantiation. 9 tests.

nodes.label: ShotPhysics
nodes.description: Computes shot velocity and spin. Referenced by test_shot_physics and test_shot_physics_shallow.

nodes.label: FakeBall
nodes.description: Test double for Ball. Has last_hit_by, bounces_since_last_hit, global_position, was_volley, both_bounces_complete, ball_bounced_since_last_hit fields.

nodes.label: FakePlayer
nodes.description: Test double for PlayerController. Has player_num, global_position, paddle_position fields.

nodes.label: FakeBallNode
nodes.description: Test double for Ball node with physics properties. Used by test_shot_physics.

nodes.label: TestRunner
nodes.description: Headless CLI test runner extending SceneTree. Preloads and runs all unit test suites, collects pass/fail totals, exits with code 0 or 1. Entry point for git hooks and CI.

nodes.label: TestAllSuites
nodes.description: RefCounted test orchestrator compatible with MCP godot_run_script. Exposes execute(scene_tree) -> String summary. Runs a subset of suites (5 vs test_runner's 8).

nodes.label: TestEditorRunner
nodes.description: @tool EditorScript that runs test_base_pose_system and test_rally_scorer directly inside the Godot editor via Ctrl+Shift+X. No scene or CLI needed.

nodes.label: E2ETestRunner
nodes.description: Runtime E2E Node that attaches to the live Game scene. Uses TimeScale.set_test_fast_forward(10x), launches a practice ball, waits for arms_log_count to be non-zero on both players, then quits pass or fail.

nodes.label: E2EFastMode
nodes.description: Minimal Node shim: reads TimeScale autoload, sets 10x speed, then calls practice_launcher.launch_ball(). Simpler sibling to e2e_test_runner with no pass/fail logic.

nodes.label: TestPlayerHitting
nodes.description: Unit test suite for PlayerHitting EMA paddle velocity tracking. Tests: EMA convergence to target, EMA after 10 frames, transfer scalar bounds [0,1], halflife reasonable range. Extends RefCounted, uses run_all(totals) protocol.

nodes.label: TestPhysicsUtils
nodes.description: Unit test suite for physics.gd _damp (scalar) and _damp_v3 (Vector3) functions. Tests: convergence, edge cases (dt=0, same value, halflife=0, huge halflife), one/two-frame rate accuracy. Pure math, no fakes or scene.

nodes.label: TestPosturePersistence
nodes.description: Scene-less unit tests for posture persistence. Verifies posture_library returns valid FOREHAND def, base_pose_library returns ATHLETIC_READY, to_preview_posture composition, and that _restore_live_posture_from_editor returns early when restore_id == -1.

nodes.label: TestBasePoseSystem
nodes.description: Unit tests for base pose blend system. Verifies library loads >= 22 defs, blend_onto_stroke preserves paddle fields and overrides body fields, to_preview_posture adopts base pose body overrides, runtime override passthrough returns explicit def unchanged.

nodes.label: TimeScaleManager
nodes.description: Autoload singleton 'TimeScale'. Single source of truth for Engine.time_scale. Manages slowmo sources (request_slowmo/release), hitstop freeze-frames, pause forced state, and test fast-forward multiplier. Priority: pause > slowmo > hitstop > normal. GODOT_TEST_FAST env var enables fast-forward at startup.

nodes.label: Hud
nodes.description: CanvasLayer HUD root. Procedurally builds all game Labels: score, state, difficulty, debug, fault, out_text, zone, speed, shot_type, posture_debug. Builds two rounded panel backgrounds (score chip, status strip). game.gd writes to labels directly.

nodes.label: SettingsPanel
nodes.description: CanvasLayer settings overlay with tabbed UI: Video (FOV, shake, hitstop, particle density, shadow quality), Gameplay (AI difficulty, reaction delay, reaction button), Audio (master/sfx/music volumes). Reads/writes Settings autoload. Fires on_close meta callback when closed.

nodes.label: PauseMenu
nodes.description: CanvasLayer pause overlay. Buttons: Resume (calls controller.close()), Settings (instantiates SettingsPanelScript as child overlay), Quit to Desktop. Owned by PauseController autoload which queue_frees it on close.

nodes.label: Settings
nodes.description: Autoload 'Settings'. Persists user://settings.cfg via ConfigFile. Exposes get_value(key, fallback) and set_value(key, value). Emits settings_changed signal on every write. Debounced auto-save (one frame defer). Categories: video, audio, gameplay.

nodes.label: PauseController
nodes.description: Autoload 'PauseController'. Listens for Escape key globally, toggles pause menu lifecycle. On open: creates PauseMenu, calls TimeScale.force_normal(), sets tree.paused=true. On close: queue_frees menu, restores paused state, calls TimeScale.release_forced_normal().

nodes.label: ExtractPosturesTool
nodes.description: @tool EditorScript for one-shot migration: snapshots PostureLibrary in-code defaults to res://data/postures/*.tres files. Clears definitions, calls _build_defaults(), then saves each definition via ResourceSaver. Re-running is safe (overwrites). Purpose: make PostureLibrary.load_or_default() read from disk instead of rebuilding in code.

nodes.label: PhysicsUtils
nodes.description: Shared physics utility script (scripts/physics.gd). Exposes _damp(current, target, halflife, dt) and _damp_v3 for exponential smoothing. Used by test_physics_utils and test_player_hitting.

nodes.label: PostureLibrary
nodes.description: Script providing paddle posture definitions. Has get_def(id), _build_defaults(), definitions array. Referenced by test_posture_persistence and extract_postures_tool.

nodes.label: BasePoseLibrary
nodes.description: Script providing base pose definitions (>= 22 entries including ATHLETIC_READY at id=0, OVERHEAD_PREP at id=14). Exposes get_def(id), has_def(id), all_definitions(). Referenced by test_posture_persistence and test_base_pose_system.

nodes.label: PracticeLauncher
nodes.description: Child node of Game scene ('practice_launcher'). Has launch_ball() method. Used by e2e_test_runner and e2e_fast_mode to fire practice balls for E2E test scenarios.

nodes.label: PostureDataDirectory
nodes.description: res://data/postures/ directory containing *.tres files written by extract_postures_tool. Named {id:02d}_{display_name_snake}.tres. Loaded by PostureLibrary.load_or_default().

hyperedges.label: Shared Physics for Human and AI
Shared Shot Computation Pipeline (human + AI both call compute_shot_velocity)
Debug Visualization Pipeline (trajectory → posture commit → intercept pool → AI indicators)
Swing Animation Pipeline (charge → follow-through → posture reset)
Ball Physics Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files collectively implementing the realistic pickleball flight model: drag, Magnus, spin, bounce COR, and calibration. Shared static API (predict_aero_step, cor_for_impact_speed, get_effective_gravity) ensures predictors stay in lockstep.

hyperedges.label: Posture Data Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Three files that together define, store, and resolve posture offsets/rotations. PostureLibrary is the data source; PostureDefinition is the schema; PostureOffsetResolver is the consumer converting IDs to world-space paddle vectors.

hyperedges.label: Posture Commit Pipeline
hyperedges.description: The trajectory-to-committed-ghost selection pipeline. PlayerAwarenessGrid feeds zone scores and approach info into PostureCommitSelector which picks the green-pool winner. PoseController then blends the base locomotion pose onto the stroke posture via PostureLibrary.

hyperedges.label: Serve Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files forming the complete serve flow: GameServe owns charge state and ball velocity computation; GameTrajectory visualises the arc; RallyScorer validates server position. Ball receives the final velocity via serve().

hyperedges.label: Rally Rules Subsystem
hyperedges.description: RallyScorer is the single authority for all fault detection (OOB, double-bounce, kitchen volley, two-bounce rule, body hit, net touch, momentum). It connects to Ball signals and emits rally_ended to game.gd.

hyperedges.label: Shot System Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files that together implement the shot velocity, spin, and trajectory computation pipeline.

hyperedges.label: Debug & Calibration Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files focused on developer debugging, physics calibration, and automated probing.

hyperedges.label: Player Animation Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Files that together build and animate the procedural player body.

hyperedges.label: Audio Tuning Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Files for real-time audio signature editing of paddle and court sounds.

hyperedges.label: Input Delegation Flow
hyperedges.description: InputHandler receives all keyboard/action input and delegates to game.gd, practice_launcher, camera_rig, posture_editor, reaction_button.

hyperedges.label: Practice & Training Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Practice ball launcher with 12 realistic shot types and TTC-driven reaction button.

hyperedges.label: Court & Rules Subsystem
hyperedges.description: Court geometry and rules engine sharing PickleballConstants.

hyperedges.label: IK System
hyperedges.description: Two-bone IK data flow: PostureDefinition fields → PostureSkeletonApplier (stores metadata) → PlayerArmIK (reads posture def + metadata, computes targets/poles) → RightArm/LeftArm (law-of-cosines solve_ik). Leg IK via Leg.solve_ik driven by PostureSkeletonApplier foot targets.

hyperedges.label: FX System
hyperedges.description: Effect pipeline: HitFeedback listens to ball signals → triggers CameraRig.add_shake, TimeScale hitstop, and FXPool.spawn_burst/spawn_decal. FXPool owns pooled ImpactBurst (CPUParticles3D) and BounceDecal nodes. BallTrail renders per-physics-tick ribbon independently.

hyperedges.label: Camera System
hyperedges.description: CameraRig owns Camera3D and CameraShake child. Modes: default overhead follow (edge-threshold pan), 3rd-person orbit (Blue/Red/editor), auto-orbit. CameraShake applies trauma-based noise offsets. game.gd calls setup()+update(); HitFeedback and GizmoController also interact with CameraRig.

hyperedges.label: Gizmo System
hyperedges.description: PostureEditorGizmos creates and manages GizmoController. GizmoController owns GizmoHandle children (PositionGizmo, RotationGizmo). Hover detection uses invisible sphere colliders; drag uses camera-facing plane intersection. Signals propagate: GizmoController → PostureEditorGizmos → posture editor UI.

hyperedges.label: PickleballConstants Consumers
hyperedges.description: Files that directly import or alias from PickleballConstants (constants.gd): PhysicsUtils (all physics+court), PostureConstants (overhead triggers), GameShots (court geometry via _refresh_court_constants). Net.gd duplicates NET_HEIGHT/COURT_WIDTH as local literals instead.

hyperedges.label: Posture Editor Tab System
hyperedges.description: All 7 editor tabs share the same design pattern: extend VBoxContainer, instantiate SliderField/Vector3Editor widgets, emit field_changed(field_name, value) signal, mutate the posture definition Resource directly in _on_field_changed, and expose set_definition(def) for state sync. Tabs are pure UI — no direct gizmo or state references.
hyperedges.pattern: Widget → lambda → _on_field_changed → mutates def + emits field_changed

hyperedges.label: Gizmo System
hyperedges.description: Three-level hierarchy: GizmoHandle (base, ray-sphere intersection, hover/select state, Label3D) → PositionGizmo (sphere + XYZ axis cylinders/cones, constrained drag axis) and RotationGizmo (3 torus rings, SDF ray marching, pitch/yaw/roll). Body-part gizmos override raycast_test to return -1 so body-mesh hover detection is not blocked.

hyperedges.label: Preview Subsystem
hyperedges.description: PostureEditorPreview orchestrates PoseTrigger (static freeze inspection) and TransitionPlayer (animated phase sequence). These two modes are mutually exclusive: play_transition releases any frozen pose first. State is read from PostureEditorState. Preview postures are contextualized via base_pose_library for 8 preview context modes.

hyperedges.label: Rally & Physics Test Group
hyperedges.description: Tests covering game simulation systems: rally_scorer (37 tests) and shot_physics (16 + 9 pure-math). Both use fake doubles and are scene-less. Run via test_runner.gd headless.

hyperedges.label: Posture Editor Test Group
hyperedges.description: Tests covering posture editor UI and posture zone logic: test_posture_editor_controls (7-tab coverage, scene-less control wiring) and test_posture_zones (zone boundaries, height tiers, green pool, grade rubric). Both are headless with inline fakes.

hyperedges.label: State ↔ Tab ↔ Gizmo Data Flow
hyperedges.description: Posture editor data flows: PostureEditorState holds current definition → tabs receive it via set_definition(def) → user edits via SliderField/Vector3Editor → tab emits field_changed → shell (posture_editor_ui) applies to def and calls refresh_from_definition → PoseTrigger live-previews. Gizmos (via gizmo_controller) independently read/write fields from the same def Resource.

hyperedges.label: Test Infrastructure
hyperedges.description: All test orchestration and execution components: CLI runner (test_runner), MCP-compatible runner (test_all_suites), editor runner (test_editor_runner), E2E runner (e2e_test_runner), and fast-mode helper (_e2e_fast_mode). All share the run_all(totals: Dictionary) protocol.

hyperedges.label: UI System
hyperedges.description: Full in-game UI stack: Hud (labels), PauseController (autoload lifecycle), PauseMenu (overlay), SettingsPanel (tabbed settings), Settings (autoload persistence). Data flows: PauseController -> PauseMenu -> SettingsPanel -> Settings autoload -> settings_changed signal -> consumers (CameraRig, AudioServer).

hyperedges.label: Fake/Mock Test Doubles
hyperedges.description: Test doubles matching the surface of real game objects: FakePlayer (Node, matches player.gd for RallyScorer), FakeBall (RefCounted, matches ball.gd for RallyScorer), FakeBallNode (Node, matches ball.gd for ShotPhysics). All field names mirror production scripts exactly.

hyperedges.label: TimeScale Consumer Group
hyperedges.description: All systems that call TimeScaleManager: PauseController (force_normal/release_forced_normal on menu open/close), E2ETestRunner (set_test_fast_forward for 10x E2E speed), E2EFastMode (same), and potentially PlayerHitting (request_slowmo for reaction hit button).

hyperedges.label: Posture Data Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Authoring pipeline: extract_postures_tool (EditorScript) reads PostureLibrary in-code defaults and writes them to res://data/postures/*.tres. At runtime PostureLibrary.load_or_default() reads from that directory. Tests (test_posture_persistence, test_base_pose_system) verify the library and blend logic directly.
